description: PIN hash uses hardcoded salt 'ww_salt_v1_2026', all users share same salt - vulnerable to rainbow table attacks and precomputed hash tables
fix_suggestion: Generate unique random salt per user, store alongside hash using PBKDF2, or switch to bcrypt/argon2 with per-user salt

description: atob() can throw on invalid base64, no try-catch around atob calls at lines 51-53 in decryptWithPin - will crash on corrupted encrypted data
fix_suggestion: Wrap atob calls in try-catch block and return null or throw descriptive error for invalid encrypted bundles

description: crypto.subtle.decrypt() can throw on authentication failure or wrong PIN, not caught - unhandled promise rejection
fix_suggestion: Wrap crypto.subtle.decrypt in try-catch to gracefully handle decryption failures and wrong PIN attempts

description: String.fromCharCode.apply(null, uint8array) fails for arrays larger than 65536 bytes (RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded)
fix_suggestion: Use Array.from(uint8array).map(b=>String.fromCharCode(b)).join('') or use TextEncoder/btoa properly for large data

description: 5-minute auto-clear timeout continues even if browser tab closed - private keys remain in RAM until timeout fires
fix_suggestion: Listen to beforeunload/visibilitychange events to immediately clear keys on page close, or use SharedWorker for better cleanup

description: verifyPin fallback to oldPin comparison is unsafe - if old PIN stored in cleartext, credentials are exposed
fix_suggestion: Remove backward compatibility fallback after migration period, enforce all PINs are hashed

description: String.fromCharCode(0-255) + btoa encoding may lose data or produce invalid base64 for binary data with high bytes
fix_suggestion: Use proper binary-to-base64 encoding: implement custom function or use btoa(String.fromCharCode(...array.slice(0,N)...)) in chunks

description: REAL_WALLET.trxPrivateKey and REAL_WALLET.privateKey accessed without null check - can throw if session not unlocked
fix_suggestion: Add guard check: if (!REAL_WALLET || !REAL_WALLET.trxPrivateKey) before using, or require session validation first

description: ethers.Wallet(REAL_WALLET.privateKey) will throw if privateKey is undefined/null or invalid hex format
fix_suggestion: Validate privateKey format before passing to ethers.Wallet(), or wrap in try-catch with user-friendly error message

description: triggerSmartContract USDT address 'TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t' is hardcoded - no validation that it's correct contract
fix_suggestion: Store USDT contract address in configuration with comment, add validation against known address, consider env variable

description: getBalance() call doesn't validate REAL_WALLET addresses - if invalid format passed, API may fail silently
fix_suggestion: Add address format validation (TRX=T+33chars, ETH=0x+40hex) before making API calls

description: mempool.space API call not wrapped in proper error handling - BTC balance fetch can hang or timeout without recovery
fix_suggestion: Add timeout and proper error handling for BTC API, use callWithRetry wrapper consistently

description: priceCache and priceCacheTime are not defined/declared - undefined variable reference, will create global leak
fix_suggestion: Declare var priceCache = null; var priceCacheTime = 0; at file top to avoid global scope pollution

description: transferCoin.id used without null check - if transferCoin undefined, will throw and break transfer flow
fix_suggestion: Add guard: if (!transferCoin || !transferCoin.id) before using it

description: COINS array accessed globally without null/array check - line 73-75 assumes COINS exists
fix_suggestion: Add check: if (typeof COINS !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(COINS)) before filtering/looping

description: Multiple fallback DOM element access patterns using _safeEl || {...fallback...} are verbose and brittle - repeated pattern
fix_suggestion: Create utility function: _safeElWithFallback(id, defaultText) to avoid repetition and improve readability

description: window.REAL_WALLET directly assigned, not protected from external script override - global object mutation vulnerability
fix_suggestion: Use Object.defineProperty(window, 'REAL_WALLET', {configurable:false, writable:false}) or wrap in IIFE to hide

description: wwGetSessionPin() and wwSetSessionPin() expose session PIN as global functions - attackers can read/modify PIN in memory
fix_suggestion: Hide in IIFE closure, do not export getSessionPin, only allow PIN verification internally

description: CSP allows 'unsafe-inline' for script-src - violates strict CSP, enables inline script injection attacks
fix_suggestion: Remove 'unsafe-inline', use nonce or hash-based CSP for inline scripts, require explicit script locations

description: updateRealAddr() function updates REAL_WALLET.address without validation - can set invalid address format
fix_suggestion: Add address format validation (must be 42 chars ETH or 34 chars TRX format) before assignment

description: wwReadTronApiKey() reads from localStorage without validation - empty/invalid API key silently fails
fix_suggestion: Add validation for API key format, fallback to default key, log warnings if key is invalid

description: Storage.set/get/remove functions not checked for existence - code assumes Store object exists globally
fix_suggestion: Add runtime check: if (!window.Store || typeof Store.setWallet !== 'function') throw error with setup instructions

description: ethers.providers.JsonRpcProvider('https://eth.llamarpc.com') hardcoded - single RPC provider, no fallback if endpoint down
fix_suggestion: Add multiple RPC endpoints with fallback logic, or load from config, check provider health before use

description: window.REAL_WALLET assignment during wallet creation - no transaction semantics, partially-created wallet visible to other scripts
fix_suggestion: Use atomic update pattern: create full object first, then single assignment, or use Object.freeze() after creation

description: TRON_GRID and ETH_RPC hardcoded in code - should be in config, difficult to change without code edit
fix_suggestion: Move RPC endpoints to configuration file or load from environment variables

description: keyExtractor fallback using index + date + amount - non-deterministic if transactions change order
fix_suggestion: Ensure item.id is always present, or use transaction hash/signature as key, add warning if key not unique

description: useEffect dependency includes onValueChange callback - if callback changes, effect re-runs unnecessarily
fix_suggestion: Use useCallback to memoize onValueChange, or remove from dependency array if side effect is safe

description: callWithRetry does not validate fn argument - will throw if fn is not callable
fix_suggestion: Add check: if (typeof fn !== 'function') throw new Error('fn must be a function')

description: QR code uses Google Charts API 'https://chart.googleapis.com/...' - external dependency, no HTTPS validation
fix_suggestion: Switch to local QR generation (already have qrcode.min.js), remove external API dependency

description: Uses allorigins.win proxy for news feed - CORS workaround indicates insecure setup, leaks data through third party
fix_suggestion: Use CORS-enabled API directly, or implement backend proxy to avoid data leakage through third-party service

description: createWallet does not validate wordCount - can generate wallet with 0 words or invalid count
fix_suggestion: Add validation: if (![12,15,18,21,24].includes(wordCount)) throw Error('Invalid mnemonic word count')

description: restoreWallet accepts raw mnemonic without BIP39 validation - invalid mnemonic will create broken wallet
fix_suggestion: Validate mnemonic against BIP39 word list before deriving addresses, reject invalid mnemonic
